title: Macrorhynchus glaucus

The genus Macrorhynchus is part of the order Hydrocharitales, which consists of aquatic plants. Within the family Polycarpaeae, Macrorhynchus glaucus is one of the species that thrive in freshwater environments. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships within the plant's taxonomic hierarchy.
